name: MenuGallery Brochure Design System
realizedIn: app/globals.css via Tailwind CSS v4 @theme inline; fonts via next/font/google in app/layout.tsx.

accent.role: The single warm-orange accent — CTAs, 'Gallery', highlights

card.role: Raised surfaces and the phone screen

display.role: Headings and wordmark — high-contrast literary serif

shadow: Soft and low — a single large-blur shadow at ~8-12% ink; never harsh. Example: 0 20px 50px -20px rgba(46, 46, 46, 0.25).

motion.pattern: Reveal-on-scroll via [data-reveal] attribute states (pending then settled), staggered by small per-item delays.
motion.reducedMotion: prefers-reduced-motion: reduce disables transitions and shows content immediately; smooth scroll is gated off too.

layout.container: max-w-6xl, centered, horizontal padding px-6 md:px-8
layout.grain: Fixed full-viewport SVG noise overlay, opacity 0.045, mix-blend-mode multiply, z-index 100.

customUtilities.dot-leader: Menu price-leader — a flex filler with a repeating radial-gradient dotted rule in currentColor.
customUtilities.grain: The paper-grain overlay class applied to an aria-hidden div in the layout.
